message:
fix(tui): correct tmux wheel binding save/restore and reduce mouse event noise

Two bugs fixed in the tmux wheel scrolling implementation:

1. TmuxWheelGuard::get_binding() used substring search (" WheelUp") which
   incorrectly matched WheelDownStatus when looking for WheelDownPane (and
   could match WheelUpStatus instead of WheelUpPane depending on ordering).
   Changed to exact token matching via split_whitespace().any() and updated
   the search keys from "WheelUp"/"WheelDown" to "WheelUpPane"/"WheelDownPane"
   to match the actual keys being overridden. Without this fix, Drop would
   fail to restore the original WheelDownPane binding and could corrupt
   unrelated WheelDownStatus bindings.

2. with_mouse_all_motion() generates MouseMsg events on every cursor movement
   (even without button presses), causing unnecessary update() traversals and
   re-renders. Switched to with_mouse_cell_motion() which still receives wheel
   scroll events but only reports motion while a button is held down.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
